'''kokachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labellar|labellar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labellar|labellar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kokachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kokachithi|kokachithi]] || [[word:kokachiji|kokachiji]] || [[word:kokachishi|kokachishi]] || [[word:kokachiki|kokachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kokachuthuthu|kokachuthuthu]] || [[word:kokachujuju|kokachujuju]] || [[word:kokachushushu|kokachushushu]] || [[word:kokachukuku|kokachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kokachuthu|kokachuthu]] || [[word:kokachuju|kokachuju]] || [[word:kokachushu|kokachushu]] || [[word:kokachuku|kokachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kokachufthuf|kokachufthuf]] || [[word:kokachufjuf|kokachufjuf]] || [[word:kokachufshuf|kokachufshuf]] || [[word:kokachufkuf|kokachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kokachethe|kokachethe]] || [[word:kokacheje|kokacheje]] || [[word:kokacheshe|kokacheshe]] || [[word:kokacheke|kokacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kokachothotho|kokachothotho]] || [[word:kokachojojo|kokachojojo]] || [[word:kokachoshosho|kokachoshosho]] || [[word:kokachokoko|kokachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kokachotho|kokachotho]] || [[word:kokachojo|kokachojo]] || [[word:kokachosho|kokachosho]] || [[word:kokachoko|kokachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kokachofthof|kokachofthof]] || [[word:kokachofjof|kokachofjof]] || [[word:kokachofshof|kokachofshof]] || [[word:kokachofkof|kokachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kokachĂŻfthĂŻf|kokachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kokachĂŻfjĂŻf|kokachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kokachĂŻfshĂŻf|kokachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kokachĂŻfkĂŻf|kokachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kokachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|kokachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kokachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|kokachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kokachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|kokachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kokachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|kokachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kokachĂŻfthĂŻf|kokachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kokachĂŻfjĂŻf|kokachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kokachĂŻfshĂŻf|kokachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kokachĂŻfkĂŻf|kokachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kokachĂŻfthĂŻf|kokachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kokachĂŻfjĂŻf|kokachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kokachĂŻfshĂŻf|kokachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kokachĂŻfkĂŻf|kokachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kokachĂŠthĂŠ|kokachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kokachĂŠjĂŠ|kokachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kokachĂŠshĂŠ|kokachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kokachĂŠkĂŠ|kokachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kokachathatha|kokachathatha]] || [[word:kokachajaja|kokachajaja]] || [[word:kokachashasha|kokachashasha]] || [[word:kokachakaka|kokachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kokachatha|kokachatha]] || [[word:kokachaja|kokachaja]] || [[word:kokachasha|kokachasha]] || [[word:kokachaka|kokachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kokachafthaf|kokachafthaf]] || [[word:kokachafjaf|kokachafjaf]] || [[word:kokachafshaf|kokachafshaf]] || [[word:kokachafkaf|kokachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kokachasha|kokachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kokachshĂ«sha|kokachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kokachrosha|kokachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kokachmusha|kokachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kokachyasha|kokachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokokachnkshĂ«sha|gokokachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokokachnkrosha|gokokachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokokachnkmusha|gokokachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokokachnkyasha|gokokachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kokakachasha|kokakachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kokakachshĂ«sha|kokakachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kokakachrosha|kokakachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kokakachmusha|kokakachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kokakachyasha|kokakachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokokakachnkshĂ«sha|gokokakachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokokakachnkrosha|gokokakachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokokakachnkmusha|gokokakachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokokakachnkyasha|gokokakachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kekĂŠchasha|kekĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kekĂŠchshĂ«sha|kekĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kekĂŠchrosha|kekĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kekĂŠchmusha|kekĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kekĂŠchyasha|kekĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokekĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gokekĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokekĂŠchnkrosha|gokekĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokekĂŠchnkmusha|gokekĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokekĂŠchnkyasha|gokekĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kokfachasha|kokfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kokfachshĂ«sha|kokfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kokfachrosha|kokfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kokfachmusha|kokfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kokfachyasha|kokfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokokfachnkshĂ«sha|gokokfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokokfachnkrosha|gokokfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokokfachnkmusha|gokokfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokokfachnkyasha|gokokfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
